message:
style(ffs-types): format POSIX file mode constants with underscore separators

Reformat all 8 POSIX file mode octal literals (S_IFMT, S_IFIFO,
S_IFCHR, S_IFDIR, S_IFBLK, S_IFREG, S_IFLNK, S_IFSOCK) with
underscore digit grouping for readability (e.g., 0o170000 → 0o170_000).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
